facebook.content:
"For the kingdom of God is not a matter of eating and drinking, but of righteousness, peace and joy in the Holy Spirit. - Romans 14:17

Righteousness, peace, and joy are more than just feelings or accomplishments – they're the very fabric of God's kingdom, woven into the lives of those who submit to His rule.

instagram.content:
"Jesus said, 'All authority in heaven and on earth has been given to me.'"

In a world where many claim authority, we must remember whose name is above every name. When He speaks, the earth listens. 

What does Jesus' authority mean to you in your daily life?

tiktok.content:
"All authority in heaven and on earth has been given to me. — Matthew 28:18

Today, many seek power from the world, but Jesus declares He holds the highest authority. Will you submit to His Lordship, or try to build your own kingdom?
